prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-MICNOTEBOOK-709573MRR-AMZ Product Type: BLANK_BOOK Brand (from catalog): Innovative Designs Existing Title: Disney Mickey Mouse 2pc Spiral Notebook and Pen Stationery Journal Boys 3 and Up Description: This officially licensed Disney kids notebook features everyone's favorite Disney mouse - Mickey. The cover also has a cool Mickey and the Roadster Racers "Speed Racers" design with his BFF Daffy Duck. This cool notebook features a spiral binding that will ensure your child can easily flip through the pages while journaling, practicing spelling, or drawing. There are 50 sheets of paper inside of each notebook, and it comes with a ballpoint pen.

The artwork on the front and back of the notepad has a cool stylized graphic featuring Mickey and the Speed Racers. Kids will love showing off their favorite characters at school. Each notepad measures just 6” x 4.5”, making this a great size for little kids. It will easily fit inside just about any school backpack, messenger bag, or lunch tote for on-the-go writing and creating.

This is a great gift or stocking stuffer idea this holiday season for young kids and Mickey Mouse fanatics. Search Terms: kids spiral notebooks boys journals diaries for boys mini spiral notebooks for boys disney stocking stuffers mickey mouse gifts for boys kids lined notebook journals for girls school notebooks for boys wirebound notebooks blank notebooks for kids Features: - MICKEY MOUSE NOTEBOOK – This officially licensed Disney kids notebook features Mickey Mickey Mouse and his Roadster Racers "Speed Racers!" - SPIRAL STYLE JOURNAL – This cool notebook features a spiral binding that will ensure your child can easily flip through the pages while journaling, practicing spelling or drawing. There are 50 sheets of paper inside of each notebook, and it comes with a ballpoint pen. - COOL GRAPHIC DESIGN – The artwork on the front and back of the notepad has a cool stylized graphic design featuring Mickey and his Speed Racers. Kids will love showing off their favorite characters at school. - COMPACT SIZE NOTEPAD – Each notepad measures just 6” x 4.5”, making this a great size for little kids. It will easily fit inside just about any school backpack, messenger bag or lunch tote for on-the-go writing and creating. - SPECIFICATIONS – Officially licensed Disney Mickey Mouse notebook with pen; Colors: Assorted; Dimensions: 6” x 4.5”; 50 sheets of paper; Safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Style of notebook: Spiral === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
